title: A new inventory solution for monday.com

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Introducing Inventory, a new stock management solution designed to help you track, manage, and optimize inventory effortlessly within monday.com.

With pre-built boards, dashboards, and automations, Inventory gives you:

Real-time Stock Visibility – Track stock levels, storage utilization, and top-selling products at a glance. Get low-stock alerts automatically before you run out.

Effortless Stock Updates – Update stock levels (single or bulk) with an easy-to-use tool, while keeping a full transaction log for transparency.

Easy Integration – Built natively for monday.com and designed to connect easily with other systems.

Try it out for yourself for free!

auth.monday.com

Optimize stock levels with this easy-to-use inventory solution
